content.headline: Angular Standalone Component Generator
content.description: Generates boilerplate code for converting module-based Angular components into standalone components with required imports and decorators

examples.label: Basic standalone component

content.how_it_works: Analyzes component and module relationships to generate standalone component decorators and import statements. Automatically handles Angular 14+ standalone syntax requirements.
